title: Leaving Hogwarts
prose: The leaving feast is the same feast it's always been — the same too-much food, the same house colours draped over the same four long tables — except that this time, when the last plates clear themselves away, it's genuinely the last time.

{{name}} looks up at the enchanted ceiling one more time, seven years older than the first night it seemed like the most extraordinary thing in the world, and finds — a little to their own surprise — that it still is.

choices.label: Walk out through the front doors, out of Hogwarts and into whatever comes next.
